title: Record soft46 tool4k and pblock8 densify
prompt: Create reports/soft46-tool4k-pblock8.md with sections for Soft 46, Tool 4k, Pblock 8/4, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Soft46 Tool4k Pblock8 Contract

## Soft 46
soft compaction trigger defaults to 0.46 with quality bias floor 0.44 so reclaim can tighten after emergency backstops

## Tool 4k
tool result budgets default to 4000 chars with 70-char previews for denser reclaim

## Pblock 8/4
parallel summarize block threshold/target defaults to 8k/4k for denser multi-chunk compaction

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/tool/status vitest
